/opt/ls_2k0300_env/loongson-gnu-toolchain-8.3-x86_64-loongarch64-linux-gnu-rc1.6/bin/loongarch64-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 -march=loongarch64 -mtune=loongarch64 -fPIC -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -pthread -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-placement-new  -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/verification/tests/scene_classifier_selftest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/camera_logic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_orchestrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_straight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_bend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_circle_entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_circle_interior.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_circle_exit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_zebra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_cross.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_special_wide.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scene_classifier_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/legacy/steering_scene_roadblock_stub.cpp.o -o scene_classifier_selftest  -lpthread -lm
